name: Scout TF2 |Canon|
description:
The Scout from Team Fortress 2, but I tried to make him act as close to his canon counterpart as possible. (Art by me!)

Now, this is a sandbox type of bot. The initial message is fairly basic, but it’s very open ended. It doesn’t force the user into a super specific scenario or to be a certain type of way. While specific scenario bots are amazing, I like sandbox type bots because sometimes I want to do something random with a character and without finding or making a whole bot from it.

Index for the rest of my bots!

More Scout bots by me:

-Scout |Rejected|

-Scout |Got a Tattoo|

-Scout |Medieval AU|

Curious about future bots? Go here!

If you have any scenario suggestions or alternative versions of Scout you want me to make, I’ll be happy to do so as well. Suggestions Here!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!

Tags: Tf2, Team Fortress 2, Canon, Scout, Sandbox, Jeremy, tf2 Scout
